New ISO 20022 Return Code Definitions Form
We created ISO 20022 Return Code Definitions, Form 9610. For wires returned with a return code, financial institutions can use the form to find the return code definition. Return codes and/or reasons display in the Sender FI to Receiver FI Information section on the Pending Incoming Wires â Details page and Received Wires â Details page in Wires.
